summary: Multiple Sept 9-10 polls show Mamdani with 15-22 point leads in 4-way race. Head-to-head with Cuomo much tighter (48-44).
content:
Key polls (all Sept 9-10, 2025):
- Quinnipiac: Mamdani 45%, Cuomo 23%, Sliwa 15%, Adams 9% (22-pt lead)
- Emerson/PIX11: Mamdani 43%, Cuomo 28%, Sliwa 10%, Adams 7% (15-pt lead)
- UMass Lowell/YouGov: Mamdani 44%, Cuomo 25% (19-pt lead)
- NYT/Siena: Mamdani 46%, Cuomo 24% (22-pt lead in 4-way)
- Head-to-head hypothetical (NYT/Siena): Mamdani 48%, Cuomo 44% - very tight

Quinnipiac also found: if Adams drops out, Mamdani still leads by double digits.
133 forecasters on Metaculus, CP at 91.00%.
